creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

This port builds OK for me. Copies of the logs are here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~swills/vw/

Can you tell me what version of the compiler you're using or provide
more complete logs? The port specifies USE_GCC=4.5+ but I've only tested
it with the latest version of the GCC 4.5 port. Perhaps rebuilding your
gcc 4.5 will help? If so, I'll update the dependencies.

Thanks,
Steve
